description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a double-cutaway design, reminiscent of classic rock instruments. The body is finished in a glossy white color, featuring four control knobs and a three-way toggle switch on the lower bout. The neck is long and slender, with a dark fretboard inlaid with rectangular position markers, and is attached to a headstock that displays a black faceplate with visible tuning pegs. The bridge and pickups are mounted on the body, with two humbucker-style pickups visible, suggesting a versatile tonal range. Chrome hardware is used for the bridge, control knobs, and tuning machines, adding a metallic accent to the overall appearance. The instrument is designed for ergonomic playability and visual appeal, suitable for use in urban music venues, street performances, or as a decorative piece in a modern environment.
description: A glossy white, double-cutaway electric guitar with chrome hardware, dual humbucker pickups, and a black headstock. Features four control knobs and a dark inlaid fretboard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the guitar's slim body profile, chrome hardware, and the full length of the neck.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the fretboard, headstock with tuning pegs, and the symmetrical double-cutaway body shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the body contour, control knobs, and the bridge area.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the body and neck, with the control knobs and pickups partially visible.
attribute_headstock_design: Black faceplate, three-per-side tuning pegs, classic Gibson open-book contour, visible logo
